qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: SQL injection in Search service via direct value interpolation in WHERE clause construction
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable component and root cause: this finding targets Search service SQL WHERE construction, not GraphQL saveAsset authorization for asset volumes.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Craft CMS GraphQL JSON Parsing Denial of Service
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.vulnerability_type: Denial of Service - Uncontrolled Resource Consumption
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same broad GraphQL area only; this finding targets Json::decode() depth/resource handling in GraphqlController, not the saveAsset resolver's missing cross-volume asset authorization check.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Broken Object Level Authorization (BOLA) in Craft CMS address management
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same broad authorization class only; this finding targets UsersController address ownership checks, not GraphQL asset mutation authorization or asset volume membership validation.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or equivalent root cause: Craft CMS GraphQL saveAsset validates the schema-resolved volume but fetches an asset by ID without verifying that the asset belongs to that authorized volume.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-fxp3-g6gw-4r4v locates the vulnerability in src/gql/resolvers/mutations/Asset.php lines 57-107 and describes cross-volume asset modification/transfer through the saveAsset GraphQL mutation.
sql_injection_search reports src/services/Search.php SQL interpolation through _sqlWhere(), a different component and vulnerability mechanism.

dos_graphql_json reports src/controllers/GraphqlController.php Json::decode() resource exhaustion, which shares the GraphQL entrypoint family but not the asset mutation resolver or authorization flaw.

bola_address_modification reports src/controllers/UsersController.php address ownership authorization failure, a different resource type, endpoint, and guard chain than the advisory's asset-volume authorization bypass.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding exists, so runtime tiering is not applicable.
